label: Artificial Intelligence
description: The field focused on building systems able to perform tasks that normally require human intelligence.

label: Symbolic AI
description: AI approach based on explicit rules, symbols and logical reasoning.

label: Rule-Based Reasoning
description: Reasoning method using if-then rules to infer conclusions.

label: Knowledge Graph
description: Graph-based representation of entities, concepts and relationships.

label: Ontology
description: Formal representation of concepts, categories and relations in a domain.

label: Connectionism
description: AI approach based on distributed representations and neural networks.

label: Machine Learning
description: Field where models learn patterns from data instead of being explicitly programmed.

label: Supervised Learning
description: Learning setting using labelled examples.

label: Unsupervised Learning
description: Learning setting where the model finds structure in unlabelled data.

label: Vector
description: Ordered list of numerical values used to represent data or features.

label: Matrix
description: Rectangular array of numbers used for transformations and model parameters.

label: Dot Product
description: Operation combining two vectors into a scalar by multiplying and summing components.

label: Linear Transformation
description: Mapping that preserves vector addition and scalar multiplication, often represented by matrices.

label: Gradient Descent
description: Optimization algorithm that updates parameters in the opposite direction of the gradient.

label: Loss Function
description: Function measuring the error between predictions and expected outputs.

label: Neural Network
description: Model composed of interconnected layers of artificial neurons.

label: Activation Function
description: Function introducing non-linearity into a neural network.

label: Backpropagation
description: Algorithm computing gradients through a neural network to update weights.

label: Deep Learning
description: Machine learning based on neural networks with multiple layers.

label: Transformer
description: Neural architecture based on attention mechanisms.

label: Attention Mechanism
description: Mechanism that weights the importance of different input tokens.

label: Large Language Model
description: Deep learning model trained on large text corpora to generate and understand language.

label: Embedding
description: Vector representation of text, tokens or entities.

label: Retrieval-Augmented Generation
description: Technique combining retrieval from external knowledge sources with text generation.

label: Agent
description: System that can plan, use tools and act toward a goal.

label: Robotics Control
description: Methods for controlling physical robot movements.
